codeReview.summary: The feature mostly implements the required routes and test coverage, but there are blocking correctness/isolation gaps in interaction conflict handling and PATCH behavior.

issues.description: POST /api/interactions checks source_id conflicts with user-scoped lookup only (`getInteractionBySourceId(..., userId)`), but the DB enforces a global unique partial index on `(channel, source_id)` (`shared/schema.ts:263-265`). A duplicate from another user bypasses this pre-check and can fail at insert with a 500 (`server/routes/relationships.ts:111-113`) instead of the required 409 conflict response.

PATCH /api/interactions/:id accepts `contactId` via `updateInteractionBodySchema` (`createInteractionBodySchema.partial()` at line 25) and forwards it directly to storage without verifying the new contact belongs to the authenticated user. A user who owns an interaction can re-point it to another user's contact ID, breaking multi-user data isolation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS says all DB operations should go through `server/storage.ts`, but this feature added a direct Drizzle query inside `server/routes.ts` for dedup lookup. This suggests the convention is either being violated in practice or needs explicit exceptions documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md: "ALL database operations go through server/storage.ts"; implementation uses `db.select().from(contacts)...` in `server/routes.ts:338-341`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill's strict "Write Tests First (RED)" procedure did not match actual execution flow for this feature; implementation edits were made before the new API test file was created.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows `Create server/routes/relationships.ts` and multiple `Edit server/routes.ts` calls before `Create server/__tests__/interactions-api.test.ts`; handoff skillFeedback also requests adjusting this guidance.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit e572e4b diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/context docs. Marking FAIL due to two blocking issues: (1) source_id conflict handling can return 500 instead of 409 because route pre-check is user-scoped while DB uniqueness is global, and (2) PATCH allows cross-user contact reassignment via contactId without ownership validation.
